Container.Name: ImmiJournal
Container.Overview: A journaling app for your Immich photo library. Write diary entries tied to your photos — browse your Immich library, select one image or a group, and capture your thoughts alongside them. Includes full-text search, tags, statistics, and a chronological feed.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the ImmiJournal web interface.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Where ImmiJournal stores its SQLite database, backups, and image cache. Persists across container updates.

Config.Name: Immich API URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Immich server API. Must end with /api. Example: http://192.168.1.100:8080/api

Config.Name: Immich API Key
Config.Description: Your Immich API key. Find it in Immich > Account Settings > API Keys.

Config.Name: App Password
Config.Description: Optional password to restrict access to ImmiJournal. When set, a login page is shown. Leave blank for open access on your local network.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID the container runs as, for file ownership on the host volume. Run 'id' in the Unraid terminal to find your UID. Default 99 (nobody) works for most setups.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID the container runs as. Default 100 (users) works for most Unraid setups.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set to 'true' only if ImmiJournal is served over HTTPS (e.g. behind a reverse proxy with SSL). Leave false for plain HTTP on a local network.
